name: the-only-investment-guide-youll-ever-need
description: Andrew Tobias's The Only Investment Guide You'll Ever Need — a personal finance toolkit covering saving, investing, insurance, taxes, and spending, with a practical emphasis on low-cost index fund investing, diversification, and avoiding common financial mistakes.
useCase: Master the fundamentals of personal finance — build an emergency fund, invest in low-cost index funds, buy the right insurance, minimize taxes, and avoid the common mistakes that derail financial success.
knownRisks: This book was first published in 1978 and has been updated multiple times — some specific tax and policy details may be outdated
Index fund investing assumes a long-term horizon and the discipline to hold through market downturns
Financial advice should be tailored to individual circumstances
